input.command:

# Rejected root .env shortcut

Do not execute this root-runtime write in parser tests:

```sh

OPENROUTER_API_KEY=
MODEL="nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b"

ENV
```

Parser tests should use `tests/fixtures/env-bootstrap/.env` after reading `.env.example`.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/payload.py:
from pathlib import Path

Path(".env").write_text(
    "NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY=\n"
    "OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\n"
    "MODEL=\"nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b\"\n"
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=\"freecc\"\n",
    encoding="utf-8",
)
